prompt: Set up CoSec authentication for a Fetcher instance with automatic token refresh. Configure SpaceIdProvider with space ID, CompositeToken for JWT storage in localStorage, and CoSecHeaders for auth headers. Show token refresh flow.
assertions: CoSecConfigurer is used with proper configuration
TokenRefresher is properly configured with refresh function
JwtTokenManager or TokenStorage is configured for token persistence
SpaceIdProvider is configured for multi-tenant support
Headers (CoSec-App-Id, CoSec-Device-Id, Authorization) are added to requests
